data.name: Serpentine Shadows and the Joys of Vengeance
data.detailed_description:
Somewhere in the post-apocalyptic future, a devastating storm leaves a band of pirates marooned on the eerie Serpent Island. As the tempest rages on, these scallywags turn to partying and drinking, oblivious to the killer lurking in the island's shadow. One by one, the pirates meet their demise. Is the killer one of their own? The vengeful natives who revere forgotten gods? Or perhaps a deranged doctor who once mended their wounds?

Tensions run high and paranoia grips the crew. It's up to Joy, the loyal maid of the infamous pirate queen Black Pearl, to unravel the tangled web of deception and old grudges. With cunning and courage, Joy must navigate the treacherous island and uncover the identity of the murderer before it's too late. Will you help her uncover the truth or will the island's dark secrets consume the crew?

Prepare for a thrilling tale of mystery and survival in Serpentine Shadows and the Joys of Vengeance!

Features:
  • Classic Visual Novel, featuring all the usual VN QoL elements.
  • Extensive (over 50 000 words!) and tantalizing script with strong femdom vibes written by an acclaimed author of erotic novels, Neale Sourna.
  • Mingle with diverse cast of memorable misfits - from the Scourge of Seven Seas, the infamous pirate queen Black Pearl, through grease smeared plumply mechanic Piglet, Pearl's right hand futanari woman Long Dong Silver, demented doctor Emma Brown, to nymphomaniac nun Sister Emmanuelle and a whore with a heart of gold, Jackie Swallow.

Discover all five endings and shed light on the Serpentine Shadows...

data.supported_languages: 英文, 波蘭文, 簡體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 11
